S:DC this IV for potassium greater than 5.0
S:USE THIS IF UNABLE TO TAKE ORAL
COM: Limit total acetaminophen dose to 4 grams daily. Limit
total acetaminophen dose to 2 grams daily for patients with
DIAGNOSIS: SPINAL STENOSIS IN THE LUMBAR REGION WITH NEUROGEN
SEX: M Serum Cr: 0.79 Est. CREATININE CL: 71.61 ML/MIN
COM: IV push over 3 to 4 minutes
*STORE AT RM TEMPERATURE, DO NOT REFRIGERATE
COM: May hold for loose stool.
- Wear ONE pair of USP800-compliant gloves to administer
- Do not open, crush, or split. Contact pharmacy if
- Place all materials (med wrappers, cups, gloves,
etc.) in a sealed plastic bag and discard into
YELLOW or BLACK hazardous waste container
- Place unused meds in pharmacy return bin or wasted meds
May repeat X 1 if no results AFTER 1 hour
COM: Nursing Note: If PRN, please obtain from PYXIS
